creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
A food for thought: qemu is now also used widely in embedded systems and RTOS development for initial testing, validation, simulation :-)

See RISC-V QEMU for initial low-level development and NuttX RTOS porting:

https://lupyuen.codeberg.page/articles/riscv.html

https://lupyuen.codeberg.page/


See Espressif's QEMU for whole big ESP32 family:

https://github.com/espressif/esp-toolchain-docs/blob/main/qemu/esp32/README.md

https://github.com/espressif/qemu


:-)
